subject: [PATCH v5 16/36] mm/khugepaged: skip private node folios when trying to collapse.

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the khugepaged functionality to skip private node folios when attempting to collapse huge pages. The collapse operation can cause new THP allocations and memory migrations, which are handled similarly to zone_device pages by disallowing collapse. This change aims to prevent potential issues arising from these operations on private node folios.
